verifier_name: Plan Contract Verification with V457 Schema and Layer Validation
description: Validates plan contract follows V457 first_slice_proof schema and layer validation requirements

required_evidence: target_carrier_line_number: exact integer line number, not TBD/unknown/placeholder
checks.fail_if: target_carrier_line_number is TBD_facade_save_method or any placeholder
checks.remediation: Find exact line number using rg or file read, write integer value

required_evidence: expected_assertions: JSON array format with at least 3 assertions
checks.fail_if: expected_assertions is missing, narrative format, or has fewer than 3 items
checks.remediation: Convert assertions to JSON array format with at least 3 concrete assertions

required_evidence: expected_side_effects: JSON array format with at least 1 side effect
checks.fail_if: expected_side_effects is missing, narrative format, or empty
checks.remediation: Convert side effects to JSON array format with at least 1 concrete side effect

required_evidence: selected_carrier must be Facade or Controller layer, not Service
checks.fail_if: selected_carrier contains 'Service' but not 'Facade' for core_entry family
checks.remediation: Search for corresponding Facade using rg 'class.*Facade' --type java, reject Service layer for core_entry

required_evidence: carrier_search_queries: at least 3 reproducible search commands or expressions
existing_production_carriers: list of carriers found or NONE_FOUND_AFTER_SEARCH
checks.fail_if: carrier_search_queries is missing, empty, or has fewer than 3 queries
checks.remediation: Add carrier_search_queries with at least 3 search commands before selecting any carrier

required_evidence: all_facades_checked: list of all *Facade.java files matching feature keywords
facade_insufficiency_reason: explanation for each Facade why it cannot carry the requirement
checks.fail_if: all_facades_checked is empty or facade_insufficiency_reason is missing
checks.remediation: Search for existing Facade carriers using: rg 'class.*Facade.*java' --type java

checks.fail_if: target_layer is missing or not in allowed layers for target_family
checks.remediation: Specify target_layer as Facade/Controller/Service and explain why appropriate for target_family

checks.validation: target_layer must match inferred layer from classpath
checks.remediation: Ensure target_layer matches the actual layer from classpath naming

experiment_references.experiment_1: V457 Executable Evidence Gate - First Slice Proof Schema
experiment_references.experiment_2: V457 Surface Coverage Gate - Layer Validation
